hooks.command: bash -c 'p=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$p" in *.meta) echo "Blocked: .meta files are managed by Unity — do not edit by hand ($p)" >&2; exit 2 ;; *Aspid.Core.HSM.Generators.dll) echo "Blocked: Aspid.Core.HSM.Generators.dll is a build artifact — rebuild via dotnet build (Directory.Build.targets copies it)" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac'
